feature: Internal Production Units (Unidades Internas) for Gerencial Cost Analysis
summary: Complete testing of Unidades Internas feature for internal production cost analysis. All 29 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend pages load correctly with all UI components functional.

Backend_unidades_internas_crud.details: All CRUD operations work correctly. Delete with dependencies (cargos/gastos) correctly returns 400 error.

Backend_personas_produccion.details: Personas list returns tipo_persona field. Can mark personas as INTERNO/EXTERNO with unidad assignment.

Backend_cargos_internos.details: Cargos list works with filters. Generate endpoint creates cargos from production movements, avoids duplicates.

Backend_gastos_unidad_interna.details: Full CRUD for gastos works. Filter by unidad works correctly.

Backend_reporte_gerencial.details: Returns vista_empresa, vista_unidades, and resumen. Corte Interno shows ingresos=588, gastos=430, resultado=158 as expected.

Frontend_unidades_internas_page.details: Page loads with 3 unidades (Corte, Costura, Acabado). Tabs work (Unidades/Personas). CRUD form opens/closes correctly.

Frontend_cargos_internos_page.details: Page loads with 1 cargo. 'Generar Cargos' button present. Filter dropdown works.

Frontend_gastos_unidad_page.details: Page loads with 2 gastos. 'Registrar Gasto' form works. Full CRUD flow tested successfully.

Frontend_reporte_gerencial_page.details: Page loads with summary cards (Total Ingresos S/588, Total Gastos S/430, Resultado S/158). Both tabs work (Vista Empresa / Vista Unidad).

Frontend_sidebar_section.details: 'Producción Interna' section visible in sidebar with all 4 links: Unidades Internas, Cargos Internos, Gastos Unidad, Reporte Gerencial.

seed_data_creation: Test data already exists: 3 unidades internas (Corte, Costura, Acabado), 1 persona INTERNO (Interno->Corte), 1 cargo interno (S/588), 2 gastos (PLANILLA_JORNAL S/350, LUZ S/80)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unidades Internas feature fully functional. Backend: All CRUD endpoints for unidades, personas tipo, cargos internos, gastos work correctly. Report endpoint returns correct totals (Corte: ingresos=588, gastos=430, resultado=158). Frontend: All 4 pages load correctly (/unidades-internas, /cargos-internos, /gastos-unidad-interna, /reporte-unidades-internas). Sidebar has 'Producción Interna' section with all links. Test data in empresa_id=7.
